title: Cypriot Trustee Markov Named in Petrov Asset Probe
body: Elena Markov, a Cyprus-based trustee with long-standing ties to the family of sanctioned Russian magnate Viktor Petrov, has been named in a fresh asset-tracing probe, two officials familiar with the matter said. Markov controls Kestrel Maritime and holds a 50% stake in Atlas Shipping, which is also 40% owned by Petrov Holdings. The arrangement, observers say, is consistent with a layered ownership pattern designed to obscure ultimate beneficial ownership. Markov could not be reached for comment.
